title: Update website name to SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB

requirements.text: Update the website name displayed in the header from 'Sports Academy Finder' to 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB' at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1]
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB' as the website name
The text is visible in the specified header location
The change applies to both desktop and mobile views

constraints: Only modify the website name in the header component
Do not change any other text or functionality
nonGoals: Changing the application title in index.html
Updating any other branding elements beyond the header name
Modifying navigation or other header components
